Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO CHILDREN AND FAMILIES

Title: Establishes the "Supporting Families Together act"; removes certain penalties for mandated reporters; repealer
Summary: Establishes the "Supporting Families Together act"; repeals certain provisions of law relating to civil and criminal penalties for mandated reporters.
ActClause: AN ACT to establish the "Supporting Families Together act"; and to repeal section 420 of the social services law relating to certain civil and criminal penalties for mandated reporters
